The Science

We don't guess. We measure, then we move.

Comprehensive labs

Quarterly panels: ApoB, hs-CRP, insulin, sex hormones, omega index, full thyroid, and biological age clocks.

Genetic context

We layer your SNP profile under GINA protection to personalize nutrient response, sleep chronotype, and risk.

Daily signal

Continuous glucose, HRV, sleep — we use the data you already collect and only adjust when the trend, not the noise, warrants it.

Protocols

Your plan is yours. Your coach is yours.

Every member is assigned one coach who builds the protocol with you and revisits it every six weeks against fresh data. No content drips, no group calls — just one accountable human and your numbers.

Longevity
  • Rapamycin candidacy review
  • Strength × VO₂ target
  • Glycemic control
Performance
  • Zone 2 + intervals
  • Recovery prescription
  • Creatine + electrolytes
Weight
  • GLP-1 candidacy review
  • Protein floor & timing
  • Continuous glucose
Cognitive
  • Sleep architecture
  • Omega-3 index ≥ 8%
  • Lion's mane stack

The stack

A short, evidence-led list.
No fairy dust.

We don't sell forty SKUs. The stack is small, the dosing is what the trials used, and it changes when your labs change.

Omega-3 Concentrate$44/mo

2.4g EPA+DHA per serving · 30-day supply

Creatine Monohydrate$18/mo

5g per scoop · 30-day supply

Vitamin D3 + K2$22/mo

Personalized dosing · 30-day supply
